scenarios.description: parse(String html, String baseUri) with non-empty html and baseUri returns Document with correct text and absolute links
scenarios.expectedResult: Document.body().text() equals "Hello World"; all relative URLs resolved against baseUri
pseudocode: TEST TC01 parse with html and baseUri
String html = "Hello World"; String baseUri = "http://example.com/dir/";

scenarios.description: parse(String html, String baseUri) with empty html returns empty body Document
scenarios.expectedResult: Document.body().html() equals ""; baseUri set but no content

scenarios.description: parse(String html) delegates to parse(html,"") yielding empty baseUri Document
scenarios.expectedResult: Document.body().text() equals "Hello"; no absolute baseUri applied

scenarios.description: parse(String html, Parser parser) with xmlParser returns Document from parser
scenarios.expectedResult: Document has no html wrapper; body().html() equals "<tag/>"
pseudocode: TEST TC04 parse html with xml parser

scenarios.description: parse(String html, String baseUri, Parser parser) with html containing base tag uses parser and resolves baseUri
scenarios.expectedResult: Document.select("base").attr("href") equals "http://override/"; link resolved against overridden baseUri
pseudocode: TEST TC05 parse html with base tag and parser
String html = "X"; String baseUri = "http://ignored/"; Parser p = Parser.htmlParser();

Create temp file with content "

F

"; no mocking
scenarios.expectedResult: Document.body().text() equals "F"; baseUri applied from argument

F

"); String charset = "UTF-8"; String baseUri = "http://b/";

scenarios.description: parse(File file) default charsetName null loads using BOM/meta and returns Document

N

"; no mocking

scenarios.description: parse(InputStream in, charsetName, baseUri) throws IOException when stream invalid
scenarios.precondition: InputStream stub that throws IOException on read; mocking necessary to simulate read error
pseudocode: TEST TC08 parse stream IO error
InputStream in = stubThrow(IOException.class); String charset = "UTF-8"; String baseUri = "http://x";

scenarios.description: parse(URL url, timeoutMillis) with valid http URL and small timeout returns Document
scenarios.precondition:
Start local HTTP server responding "

S

" quickly; no mocking
pseudocode: TEST TC09 parse URL with timeout

scenarios.description: parse(URL url, timeoutMillis) throws java.net.MalformedURLException for non-http URL
pseudocode: URL url = new URL("ftp://example.com"); int timeout = 1000;
